summary: Transition Split Doors component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的对开门转场组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/transition-split-doors/src/TransitionSplitDoors.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TransitionSplitDoors` and `transitionSplitDoorsDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Transition Split Doors Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/transition-split-doors to my project. Preserve the exported TransitionSplitDoorsProps API and register the TransitionSplitDoors composition with the default props.
